data.title: Charles Schwab Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE: SCHW) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 16, with analysts predicting earnings of $1.39 per share, up from $1.04 per share a year ago. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue is $6.49 billion, compared to $5.6 billion the previous year. As of February, Charles Schwab reported total client assets amounting to $12.22 trillion. On the day before the earnings announcement, company shares increased by 1.9% to close at $100.27. For more detailed analyst ratings and information, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: GAC Drives Global Growth at the 139th Canton Fair with Three Globalization Strategies
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on April 15, 2026, GAC presented its AION i60, S7, and M8 models at the 139th Canton Fair with the theme "WHERE CRAFT MEETS TECHNOLOGY." These flagship vehicles were highlighted at the event. GAC was the sole automotive brand showcased at the Canton Fair Cuisine Festival, reinforcing its presence with attendees.

data.title: Milesight Marks 15th Anniversary, Reinforces "Build Deep with V.I.R" Strategy
data.description: Celebrating its 15th anniversary on April 16, 2026 in Xiamen, China, Milesight, a leading provider of AI-powered video surveillance solutions, reasserts its enduring strategy under the theme "Build Deep with V.I.R." This milestone signifies the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the dynamic security sector.

data.title: Hannover Messe: TeamViewer highlights Agentless Access and AI-supported maintenance for industrial operations
data.description: In collaboration with Bechtle, a new secure access gateway hardware has been introduced for quick and easy deployment of secure and scalable remote access for industrial systems. This innovative hardware allows for seamless integration of TeamViewer's AI agent Tia with Assist AR, a remote assistance solution, enhancing on-site troubleshooting capabilities. This partnership aims to provide improved efficiency and security for industrial systems.

data.title: Binance Has 'Reached The Scale' Of Major Asian National Commodities Exchanges In Gold Perpetuals Trading, Says Co-CEO Teng
data.description: Binance's co-CEO Richard Teng revealed that the platform's gold perpetual trading volume has reached levels comparable to national commodity exchanges. The growth of perpetual futures for traditional assets like stocks, gold, and silver on crypto exchanges was noted in Binance's research, emphasizing the rapid expansion. Binance holds a significant market share of 41%, leading the way in this sector. According to CoinGecko data, Binance recorded a total perpetual trading volume of $46 billion in the past 24 hours. The gold perpetual volume on crypto exchanges exceeded that of the Dubai Gold & Commodities Exchange and the Multi Commodity Exchange by over two times and four times, respectively.

data.title: Scania expands Services 360 portfolio to include electric and used vehicles
data.description: A comprehensive new program has been launched in Södertälje, Sweden on April 16, 2026, targeting the distinct needs of electric trucks by providing dedicated offerings that encompass various aspects such as batteries. Additionally, a range of repair, maintenance, and productivity coverage options are now accessible for pre-owned combustion engine vehicles. This initiative aims to cater to the diverse requirements of both electric and traditional trucks.

data.title: Why Tens of Thousands of Foreign Patients Are Choosing This Gangnam Clinic
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, a new aesthetic clinic center called REBERRY Clinic has recently opened its Gangnam branch. The clinic offers a combination of FDA-cleared devices and advanced stem cell therapies to its clients.

data.title: Valley View Villa Joins the Strike
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, long term care workers at Valley View Villa, who are part of Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) Local 2330, will commence their strike today. This action coincides with 24 other long term care facilities across the province. These workers will be forming picket lines alongside Maritime Odd Fellows employees at 739 E River Rd in New Glasgow. Despite being 4 days into the strike that involves over 2,000 workers, Minister Adams maintains that the government's proposal is robust and competitive. The strike is expected to grow in size as more workers join the protest.

data.title: Highly Anticipated Phantom Theater Previews for Media Ahead of Kings Island's 2026 Season Opening
data.description: Kings Island's new Phantom Theater is set to debut their Nightmare dark ride on April 18, 2026, as part of the park's 55th season. The premiere includes an exclusive media preview happening today. This opening marks an exciting event for visitors as the park introduces this thrilling addition to its attractions.

data.title: Explore and Experience: FIBO 2026 Brings Healthy Living to Life
data.description: Cologne, Germany, April 16, 2026 - Beginning today until April 19, FIBO will turn the Cologne Exhibition Centre into a vibrant hub of fitness, health, and lifestyle. The event aims to showcase innovative exercise techniques and promote holistic well-being. Participants will have the opportunity to explore a range of physical activities and learn about the latest trends in fitness.

data.title: Shipsy Named a Niche Player in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ and recognized in Critical Capabilities for Transportation Management Systems
data.description: Today in Amsterdam, Shipsy, a prominent company offering complete AI-native logistics solutions, revealed that it has been identified as a Niche Player in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Transportation Management Systems (TMS). This marks the third year in a row that Shipsy has received this recognition. The Magic Quadrant distinguishes companies based on their completeness of vision and ability to execute. This achievement underscores Shipsy's reputation within the industry.

data.title: Zerova signs Nordics distribution agreement with Skårebo
data.description: Zerova, a company specializing in EV charging solutions, revealed a new distribution partnership with Skårebo, a key distributor in the Nordics region. This collaboration aims to enhance local accessibility, logistics, and assistance for mobile EV charging solutions. The agreement, announced in Amsterdam on April 16, 2026, highlights the commitment to expanding this service in the area.

data.title: SOLUM and Gander Partner to Help Retailers Reduce Food Waste With Smarter, Simpler Markdown Execution
data.description: A retail technology solutions provider, SOLUM, has revealed a significant partnership with Gander. The collaboration aims to demonstrate integrated solutions at the upcoming RTS 2026 event in London. This partnership is expected to bring innovative offerings to the forefront of the industry.

data.title: payabl. launches Click to Pay with Visa to help merchants improve checkout conversion and reduce fraud
data.description: A new card payment experience called Click to Pay with Visa has been introduced by payabl. The aim is to assist merchants in reducing checkout friction and enhancing authorization rates, leading to a quicker and more secure online payment process. This innovative solution replaces the need for manually entering card numbers with a token-based checkout system. Customers simply enroll their card once, allowing them to finalize purchases swiftly with just a few clicks without the need to re-enter their card information. The outcome is a streamlined checkout process that provides a seamless and convenient experience for the users.

data.title: CONNACT Expands into UKI to Help AWS ISVs Scale Cloud Partnerships and Revenue
data.description: CONNACT has announced its expansion into the UK and Ireland, enhancing its presence in London. This move aims to support AWS Independent Software Vendors (ISVs) in scaling their cloud partnerships, driving co-selling activities, and increasing marketplace revenue.
Buyback details: April 9 - April 15, 2026. No. of shares bought back undisclosed. Watch this space for updates.

data.title: Atos Supported the European Space Agency in Selecting Twelve Service Providers through an Open Competition to deliver Advanced Applications & Services on the DestinE Platform
data.description: Atos assisted the European Space Agency (ESA) in choosing 12 service providers through a competitive process to provide advanced applications and services on the DestinE platform.

data.title: Energy market defined by “striking contradiction”, according to latest Willis Energy Market Review
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in London, a recent Energy Market Review by Willis, a WTW business, revealed that the energy insurance market continues to stay soft. This is despite increasing loss activity, social inflation, and geopolitical uncertainty. The market boasts ample capacity, strong competition, and a consistent decrease in rates. The report showcased the resilience of the market, even in the face of these challenges. Willis, a WTW business trading under NASDAQ as WTW, highlighted these trends in their latest publication.
